message:
fix(api): add #[must_use] annotations and missing PartialEq/Eq derives

Add #[must_use] to public query/constructor methods across 7 data structures:
- consistent_hash: new, with_nodes, node_count, vnode_count, is_empty,
  contains_node, get_node, stats (8 methods)
- van_emde_boas: new, universe_size, len, is_empty, min, max, contains,
  successor, predecessor (9 methods)
- interval_tree: Interval::new/overlaps/contains_point/is_empty,
  IntervalTree::new/len/is_empty/query_overlap/query_point (9 methods)
- r_tree: Rect::new/point/area/contains_point/overlaps/enlargement/
  min_distance, RTree::new/len/is_empty (10 methods)
- splay_tree: new, len, is_empty, get, contains_key, kth, rank, min,
  max, keys, iter (11 methods)
- treap: new, with_seed, len, is_empty, get, contains_key, kth, rank,
  min, max, to_sorted_vec, keys (12 methods)

Add PartialEq + Eq derives to pure-data structs:
- error.rs: RemediationCommand, Remediation
- fd_budget.rs: SystemLimits, LimitValidation, LimitCheck
- pool.rs: PoolStats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
